title: salix × boettcheri
intro: Salix × boettcheri, also known as Boettcher's willow or Boettcher's hybrid willow, is a hybrid willow plant that is a cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. This plant contains salicin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Salix × boettcheri have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, and its health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as acting as an antiseptic and astringent. Salix × boettcheri can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized in a variety of ways.
